_note: Jason-confirmed allergen flags for genuinely-new standard-menu dishes (2026-06-26). Flags use DOOR menu_current.json *_flags keys. Dishes not listed here carry CODEX-verified flags forward from menu_current.json v30 / RECIPE_ALLERGEN_MAP.

Portobello Cheese Melt.confirmed: gluten, soy (from gravy powder); vegan cheese so NO dairy

Vegan Gyro.confirmed: gluten (naan), soy (vegan protein); vegan sauce so NO dairy

Veggie Burger.confirmed: actually a BLACK BEAN burger: gluten (bun), fully vegan, NO soy, no egg, no dairy. Resolves to existing 'Black Bean Patties' recipe -> alias for scheduling (cooks at Rex).

_global_no_mustard_mayo: Jason 2026-06-26: all mayo is no-mustard. Coleslaw/potato-salad/ranch/tartar slots = egg+sulphites, NEVER mustard. Apply across menu.

Pulled Pork Sandwich.confirmed: gluten (bun), egg+sulphites (creamy coleslaw, no-mustard mayo), soy+sulphites (BBQ sauce), pork. NO mustard.

Pulled Chicken Sandwich.confirmed: gluten (bun), egg+sulphites (creamy coleslaw), soy+sulphites (BBQ sauce), chicken. NO mustard.

Vegan Jack Fruit Sandwich.confirmed: gluten (bun), soy+sulphites (BBQ sauce), vegan (egg-free slaw, no dairy). NO mustard.

Nigerian Fish.confirmed: fish + spicy. No added gluten. Coconut (lime coconut rice) NOT flagged as tree-nut.

Nigerian Styled Tofu.confirmed: soy (tofu) + spicy. No added gluten. Coconut not flagged.

_note_vegan_chicken_family: Jason 2026-06-26: vegan breaded chick'n substitutes = gluten+soy. EXCEPT Vegan Drumsticks which are CHICKPEA-based = no restrictions.

Chickpea Drumstick Wrap.confirmed: gluten (wrap) only; chickpea drumstick has no restriction

_note_vegan_sausage_family: ASSUMED soy+gluten (typical vegan sausage/patty = soy protein + wheat). Jason to confirm pea-vs-soy on his VERIFY skim.
_note_codex: From CODEX recipe cards (Jason 2026-06-26): authoritative allergens for the cold salads + glazed ham + shawarma sauce.

Tuna Rex Salad.confirmed: CODEX: Fish only — OIL-based (no mayo) so NO egg

Chickpea Rex Salad.confirmed: CODEX: vegan oil-based chickpea mix, no allergens

Glazed Ham.confirmed: CODEX: None (pork from name only) — NOT sulphites
